code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> PENDING: Initialize Node
    
    PENDING --> READY: Dependencies Complete
    PENDING --> SKIPPED: Dependency Failed
    
    READY --> RUNNING: Start Execution
    READY --> SKIPPED: Guard Blocked
    
    RUNNING --> COMPLETE: Success
    RUNNING --> FAILED: Error
    
    FAILED --> READY: Retry (future)
    
    COMPLETE --> [*]: Terminal
    SKIPPED --> [*]: Terminal
    
    note right of PENDING
        Waiting for dependencies
        to complete
    end note
    
    note right of READY
        All dependencies satisfied,
        can be scheduled
    end note
    
    note right of RUNNING
        Currently executing
        node handler
    end note
    
    note right of COMPLETE
        Successfully completed
        with output
    end note
    
    note right of FAILED
        Execution failed
        with error
    end note
    
    note right of SKIPPED
        Bypassed due to failed
        dependencies or guards
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个工作流节点的状态机，从初始化开始，节点先进入等待依赖的PENDING状态，等依赖都完成了才能变成READY。
明白，那如果某个依赖失败了怎么办？节点是直接失败，还是有其他路径？
依赖失败的话，这个节点应该被跳过，走SKIPPED状态，直接到终止。另外READY之后也不一定执行，可能被guard条件拦住，也是走SKIPPED。
好的，所以SKIPPED有两个来源：依赖失败或者guard拦截，都是终态。那READY正常流转就是开始执行，进入RUNNING对吧？
对，RUNNING之后分成功和失败两条路：成功到COMPLETE然后结束；失败的话到FAILED，但FAILED可以重试，未来回到READY重新调度。
结构我画好了，现在给每个状态加注释说明吧。PENDING写"Waiting for dependencies to complete"，READY写"All dependencies satisfied, can be scheduled"。
RUNNING注释用"Currently executing node handler"，COMPLETE是"Successfully completed with output"，FAILED写"Execution failed with error"，SKIPPED写"Bypassed due to failed dependencies or guards"。
都加上了，COMPLETE、SKIPPED到终态的箭头也标了Terminal。整个状态机从初始化到终态的流转都完整了，您看还有什么要调整的吗？
